name: timeline
title: Timeline
description: A horizontal timeline: a thin line strokes itself on, then dots cascade in at each anchor with the canonical Onda stagger, then labels fade in beneath. The final dot earns the dusty-rose accent — one focal moment, the rest neutral.
pickWhen: an ordered sequence with milestones — roadmap, company history, release cadence. Use `progress-steps` for active state through a flow.
